store_headline: WooCommerce Theme for Wineries and Wine Shops
store_subheadline: Sell wine online and promote tastings and tours with a store built for wineries and vineyards
features: WooCommerce integration for wine shop and online store
Variation swatches for wine varieties and product options
Event management for tastings, vineyard tours, and wine events
Clean, elegant Elementor-based design optimized for wine brands
Wolf Core plugin with custom Elementor widgets
Contact forms for reservations and inquiries
One-click demo import with complete winery setup
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The only winery and vineyard theme in the catalog — built for wine businesses, not food-and-drink templates
Full-bleed grape-harvest photography and warm earthy editorial palette that communicates terroir and authenticity
WooCommerce wine store with variation swatches for format and vintage — the right UX for wine retail
Events system for tastings, vineyard tours, and harvest festivals built directly into the theme
Currency switcher supports international wine market sales across regions
Elementor-powered with Slider Revolution — no developer needed to customize your vineyard story
Wine store, tasting events, and tour calendar combined in a single purpose-built theme
Burgundy and gold European winery aesthetic that matches the visual expectations of wine buyers worldwide
key_benefits: Sell wine with product layouts designed for vintage, format, and varietal
Drive bookings through a purpose-built events system for tastings and tours
Build a winery site selling bottles, experiences, and your vineyard story
Attract international buyers with multi-currency support and editorial identity
Convert tasting room visitors into online customers with harvest photography
Launch your wine club on a platform built to sell wine
Establish a digital presence that matches the craftsmanship of your product
design_features: Product catalog displays optimized for wine retail
Elegant typography suited to wine branding
Instagram gallery integration for product and lifestyle imagery
Clean, airy layouts that evoke the wine experience
use_cases: Wine Tourism and Tour Booking Sites
